name: Talon -Cattails wildwood story
description:
Holy crap Its hit character Talon from from hit video game cattails wildwood story!!!

uhhhhhh this is my first bot and its mainly made for me either way cause i couldn't find a Talon bot. open to making other cattails bots but I have other things to do that take priority so no promises. I am attempting to write it to behave like how i interpret them when they're at 4 star friendship but not dating yet i might make bots of 1-2 star friendship, dating bot, or a marriage bot. the premise is that user (the leader of the colony) has been going out hunting extremely early and Talon is not happy about it.
creator: AquaticCrow
